faqs.question: How do I upgrade my plan?
faqs.answer: You can upgrade your plan by going to Settings > Billing and selecting 'Upgrade'. Your new limits will apply immediately.

faqs.question: The agent is stuck in a sandbox
faqs.answer: If your agent is stuck in a sandbox, ensure you have disabled the 'sandbox_mode' flag in your configuration file and restarted the service.

faqs.question: How do I invite team members?
faqs.answer: Navigate to the Team tab and click 'Invite Member'. They will receive an email link to join your workspace.
